expectations.text: Identifies that the codebase already has caching (nlSuggestionRepository DB cache or inflightSuggestionGenerations map)
expectations.evidence: Identifies all 3 layers: Postgres/file repository, in-process inflight dedup Map, and frontend Zustand store with per-project status tracking.

expectations.text: Flags Redis as redundant or over-engineered given existing caching mechanisms
expectations.evidence: 'The plan introduces significant infrastructure complexity to solve a problem that is already solved.' Verdict in header: 'Overengineered.'

expectations.text: Critiques the cache warmer (pre-generating for all projects on startup is wasteful/slow)
expectations.evidence: Step 4 analysis: 'fires expensive LLM calls for every project on every server restart... Harmful at scale... Unnecessary.'
Recommendation section: 'Do not implement this plan.' Proposes measuring first, then in-process LRU if needed, or connection pooling tuning.

expectations.text: Review is structured with clear priority levels (critical vs minor)
expectations.evidence: Uses severity levels in risk assessment table (High/Medium/Low). Has structured sections with clear verdict, issue-by-issue analysis, risk table, and recommendation.

expectations.text: References specific files or code from the actual codebase (not generic advice)
expectations.evidence: References nlSuggestionRepository.ts with line numbers, nlSuggestions/index.ts line 26 and 208, datasets.ts lines 238/476, scripts/dev/run.mjs, config.ts, migration 011, unique index details.
